emails.subject: Reminder letter for California filing deadline
emails.subject_base: Reminder letter for California filing deadline
emails.body: Joseph: Please contact these folks and remind them that 1) i'm not a lobbyist, 2) i'm not registered as a lobbyist, and 3) i don't qualify as a lobbyist. thanks a million. Jeff Forwarded by Jeff Dasovich/NA/Enron on 01/26/2001 10:07 AM Cshieldspc@aol.com 01/25/2001 09:59 PM
